content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on track slightly left of center navigating a right-hand bend.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 49, target = 49 + 5 = 54
- Waypoint 54: (4.7352, 2.8213)
- Car position: (5.3762, 2.6021)
- Bearing = atan2(2.8213 - 2.6021, 4.7352 - 5.3762) = atan2(0.2192, -0.6410)
- = 180 - atan2(0.2192, 0.6410) = 180 - 18.88° = 161.12°
- Current heading: -177.09° → equivalent to 182.91°
- Delta = 161.12 - 182.91 = -21.79° → right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, delta to target waypoint 54 is -21.79° indicating a moderate right correction needed, applying -20 steering to follow the waypoint line through the right curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight section heading ~180° (due west) along y≈2.77",
    "Right-curving section spans waypoints 48-55, delta consistently -18 to -22°",
    "Car is consistently ~0.16-0.17m left of center — slight left bias throughout",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for delta <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Track width ~0.76m — 0.17m left of center is safe but watch for tightening",
    "Heading is ~-177° (essentially due west), track curves right (south) ahead",
    "Delta around -20 to -22° in this section confirms consistent right curve",
    "Speed 1.0 used for delta ~20°; reduce only for sharp turns >30° delta",
    "Waypoints 49-54 show gradual right curve continuing, maintain -20 steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.6765, 5.5756, 5.4822, 5.3762],
    "y": [2.6283, 2.6130, 2.6036, 2.6021],
    "yaw": [-179.042, -176.744, -176.100, -177.092]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -21.79,
  "speed": 1.0,
  "steering_angle": -20.0
}
```
